task_completion.description: Add a Fog node and configure its color, type, and visibility range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, a 'Fog' node should be visible. In the Field Editor/properties panel for this node, 'color' should be set to [0.93 0.96 1.0], 'fogType' to 'EXPONENTIAL', and 'visibilityRange' to 50.0.

task_completion.description: Adjust the DirectionalLight intensity and color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, the 'DirectionalLight' node should be selected. The Field Editor should show 'intensity' set to 0.4 and 'color' set to [1 0.9 0.7].

task_completion.description: Modify the Background skyColor and luminosity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, the 'Background' node should be selected. The Field Editor should show 'skyColor' set to [0.4 0.5 0.6] and 'luminosity' set to 0.8.

task_completion.description: Update the FIELD_ROBOT perception_camera far clipping plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, under the 'FIELD_ROBOT' node hierarchy, the 'perception_camera' (Camera node) should be selected. The Field Editor should show the 'far' clipping plane property set to 80.0.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog in Webots or a file manager/terminal window showing the file 'adverse_weather.wbt' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to modify the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Webots Scene Tree and Field Editor, rather than just editing a .wbt text file in a code editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the required values into the property fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or adjusting values in the Webots Field Editor for the Fog, DirectionalLight, Background, and Camera nodes.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the 'File -> Save World As...' menu in Webots, rather than just copying or renaming files via terminal commands without applying the changes in the software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: /home/ga/Desktop/adverse_weather.wbt. Expected Fog visibilityRange: 50.0. Expected Fog fogType: EXPONENTIAL. Expected DirectionalLight intensity: 0.4. Expected Camera far clipping plane: 80.0.
